headline: P&L exposure: ₹50.38 Cr direct demand + ₹20.12 Cr compliance/operational/revenue risk (computed via β elasticities)
what_matters: Triggers GRI:207 (Tax) and ESRS G1 (Business Conduct); non-compliance could lead to further penalties and scrutiny under CSRD for EU operations.
Minor P/E compression (0.05x) possible; margin erosion of 10.1 bps; direct revenue at risk: ₹6.3 Cr (computed via β elasticity).
Potential for higher cost of capital if ESG ratings drop; risk of fund outflows from ESG-sensitive investors due to weak GRI disclosure.
action: Quantify exposure: ₹50.38 Cr direct demand + ₹20.12 Cr compliance/operational/revenue risk (computed via β elasticities)
